name: AdGuard Home
description: Network-wide software for blocking ads and tracking
compose:
name: slashnode-adguard-home
services:
  server:
    image: adguard/adguardhome:v0.107.77
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - '--no-check-update'
      - '-c'
      - /opt/adguardhome/conf/AdGuardHome.yaml
      - '-w'
      - /opt/adguardhome/work
      - '--web-addr'
      - 0.0.0.0:8095
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - server_data-work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - server_data-conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-work:
    name: slashnode-adguard-home_server_data-work
  server_data-conf:
    name: slashnode-adguard-home_server_data-conf
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (adguard-home). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://adguard.com/fr/adguard-home/overview.html. ⚠️ SECURITY: server: extra capabilities ["NET_ADMIN"]; server: host network mode — bypasses Caddy/Tor isolation, binds host interfaces directly.
